chapter_title: About the Forbiddance of Believing in bad Omens

hadith_entries.text:
946. Narrated Anas ibn Malek 'The Prophet
"No infection or Tiyarah, but I like Al Fa'l." They said; "What
is AlFa'l?' He said: "A good word." (Bukhari).

947. Narrated Abdullah ibn Omar may Allah be pleased
with them; 'I heard the Prophet saying: "(If there is) evil
omen, it would be in three things; the horse, the women, and
the house." (Bukhari).
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)

948. Narrated Abdullah ibn Mas'oud; 'The Messenger of
Allah said: "Evil omen is a form of polytheism. And none
of us except that he has a portion of it, but Allah eliminates it
through putting one's trust in Him."
